notes: Same as baseline_attn but on LaTeX-stripped corpus. Top-5 predictions now real words (no formula fragments). Val Top-1 slightly down because ~9% less data but qualitative gain visible.
Clean corpus + CG maxiter 2000 (vs 200). Train Top-1 jumped 17.3% to 22.1%; Val Top-1 8.4% to 10.3% (+1.9pp vs T042, +1.2pp vs baseline). Residual fell 60x (0.006 to 0.0001). Best Val Top-1 so far.

2 stacked attention layers with random Q/K/V + FFN + residual + layernorm per layer. FEAT=128 (final state + last emb). Val Top-1 marginal (10.5% vs 10.3%) but Val Top-5 +2.4pp (27.0% vs 24.6%) — the model gets the right answer into top-5 more often. Qualitative: Top-5 now includes genuine German words like 'ist', 'der', 'von', 'ich'.
